studentInformation.dateOfBirth: string - Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format
studentInformation.studentPhoto: file - Student photo file (image, max 50KB, 300x300px recommended)
studentInformation.religion: string - Religion value (rel1, rel2, rel3, rel4)
studentInformation.applyingForClass: string - Class applying for (ষষ্ঠ, সপ্তম, অষ্টম, নবম, দশম)
studentInformation.previousClass: string - Previous class completed (পঞ্চম, ষষ্ঠ, সপ্তম, অষ্টম, নবম)

guardianInformation.whoGuardian: string - Who is guardian (whoguard1=Father, whoguard2=Mother, whoguard3=Other)
guardianInformation.guardianName: string - Guardian's name in Bangla (only if whoGuardian is whoguard3)
guardianInformation.guardianNameEnglish: string - Guardian's name in English (only if whoGuardian is whoguard3)
guardianInformation.guardianNID: string - Guardian's NID (only if whoGuardian is whoguard3)
guardianInformation.guardianPhone: string - Guardian's phone (only if whoGuardian is whoguard3)
guardianInformation.guardianOccupation: string - Guardian's occupation code 1-8 (only if whoGuardian is whoguard3)
guardianInformation.guardianRelation: string - Relation with guardian code 1-15 (only if whoGuardian is whoguard3)
guardianInformation.guardianYearlyIncome: string - Guardian's yearly income (only if whoGuardian is whoguard3)

permanentAddress.sameAsPresent: boolean - Whether permanent address is same as present address

contactInformation.primaryPhone: string - Primary mobile number for communications

documents.academicTranscript: file - Academic transcript/certificate (image or PDF, max 200KB)
documents.birthCertificate: file - Birth certificate (image or PDF, max 200KB)

admissionFormSubmission.termsAccepted: boolean - Whether terms and conditions are accepted

submissionMetadata.applicationTime: string - ISO 8601 datetime when form was submitted

notes.fileHandling: Files should be uploaded as multipart/form-data. Backend should validate file types, sizes, and scan for malware.
notes.conditionalFields: Guardian fields (guardianName, guardianNameEnglish, guardianNID, guardianPhone, guardianOccupation, guardianRelation, guardianYearlyIncome) are only required when whoGuardian is 'whoguard3' (Other).
notes.addressHandling: When permanentAddress.sameAsPresent is true, backend should copy all present address fields to permanent address fields.
notes.bangladeshiPhoneFormat: Phone numbers must start with 01 followed by 3-9 and then 8 more digits (total 11 digits).
notes.nidFormats: Bangladesh NID can be 10, 13, or 17 digits.
notes.birthRegistrationFormat: Birth registration number is exactly 17 digits.
notes.responseFormat: On successful submission, backend should return: { success: true, applicationId: 'unique_id', message: 'Application submitted successfully', pdf_url: 'url_to_generated_pdf' }
notes.errorFormat: On validation error: { success: false, errors: { field: ['error messages'] } }
notes.statusCodes: 201 for successful creation, 422 for validation errors, 500 for server errors
